properties.name: storageType
properties.description: Name of storage type.

properties.name: usage
properties.description: Storage usage (bytes).

types.description:
Pair of issuer origin and number of available (signed, but not used) Trust
Tokens from that issuer.
Protected audience interest group auction identifier.
Enum of interest group access types.
Enum of network fetches auctions can do.
Enum of shared storage access scopes.
Enum of shared storage access methods.
Struct for a single key-value pair in an origin's shared storage.
Details for an origin's shared storage.

properties.name: creationTime
properties.description: Time when the origin's shared storage was last created.

properties.name: length
properties.description: Number of key-value pairs stored in origin's shared storage.

properties.name: remainingBudget
properties.description: Current amount of bits of entropy remaining in the navigation budget.

properties.name: bytesUsed
properties.description:
Total number of bytes stored as key-value pairs in origin's shared
storage.

types.description:
Represents a dictionary object passed in as privateAggregationConfig to
run or selectURL.

properties.name: aggregationCoordinatorOrigin
properties.description: The chosen aggregation service deployment.

properties.name: contextId
properties.description: The context ID provided.

properties.name: filteringIdMaxBytes
properties.description: Configures the maximum size allowed for filtering IDs.

properties.name: maxContributions
properties.description: The limit on the number of contributions in the final report.

types.description: Pair of reporting metadata details for a candidate URL for `selectURL()`.
Bundles a candidate URL with its reporting metadata.

properties.name: url
properties.description: Spec of candidate URL.

properties.name: reportingMetadata
properties.description: Any associated reporting metadata.

types.description:
Bundles the parameters for shared storage access events whose
presence/absence can vary according to SharedStorageAccessType.

properties.name: scriptSourceUrl
properties.description:
Spec of the module script URL.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: addModule and
createWorklet.

properties.name: dataOrigin
properties.description:
String denoting "context-origin", "script-origin", or a custom
origin to be used as the worklet's data origin.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethod: createWorklet.

properties.name: operationName
properties.description:
Name of the registered operation to be run.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: run and selectURL.

properties.name: operationId
properties.description:
ID of the operation call.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: run and selectURL.

properties.name: keepAlive
properties.description:
Whether or not to keep the worket alive for future run or selectURL
calls.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: run and selectURL.

properties.name: privateAggregationConfig
properties.description:
Configures the private aggregation options.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: run and selectURL.

properties.name: serializedData
properties.description:
The operation's serialized data in bytes (converted to a string).
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: run and selectURL.
TODO(crbug.com/401011862): Consider updating this parameter to binary.

properties.name: urlsWithMetadata
properties.description:
Array of candidate URLs' specs, along with any associated metadata.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethod: selectURL.

properties.name: urnUuid
properties.description:
Spec of the URN:UUID generated for a selectURL call.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethod: selectURL.

properties.name: key
properties.description:
Key for a specific entry in an origin's shared storage.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: set, append, delete, and
get.

properties.name: value
properties.description:
Value for a specific entry in an origin's shared storage.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: set and append.

properties.name: ignoreIfPresent
properties.description:
Whether or not to set an entry for a key if that key is already present.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethod: set.

properties.name: workletOrdinal
properties.description:
A number denoting the (0-based) order of the worklet's
creation relative to all other shared storage worklets created by
documents using the current storage partition.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: addModule, createWorklet.

properties.name: workletTargetId
properties.description:
Hex representation of the DevTools token used as the TargetID for the
associated shared storage worklet.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: addModule, createWorklet,
run, selectURL, and any other SharedStorageAccessMethod when the
SharedStorageAccessScope is sharedStorageWorklet.

properties.name: withLock
properties.description:
Name of the lock to be acquired, if present.
Optionally present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods: batchUpdate,
set, append, delete, and clear.

properties.name: batchUpdateId
properties.description:
If the method has been called as part of a batchUpdate, then this
number identifies the batch to which it belongs.
Optionally present only for SharedStorageAccessMethods:
batchUpdate (required), set, append, delete, and clear.

properties.name: batchSize
properties.description:
Number of modifier methods sent in batch.
Present only for SharedStorageAccessMethod: batchUpdate.

properties.name: name
properties.description: If not specified, it is the default bucket of the storageKey.

properties.name: quota
properties.description: Storage quota (bytes).

properties.name: lookbackWindow
properties.description: duration in seconds

properties.name: start
properties.description: duration in seconds

properties.name: ends
properties.description: duration in seconds

properties.name: value
properties.description:
number instead of integer because not all uint32 can be represented by
int

properties.name: budget
properties.description:
number instead of integer because not all uint32 can be represented by
int, only present for source registrations

properties.name: limit
properties.description:
number instead of integer because not all uint32 can be represented by
int

properties.name: expiry
properties.description: duration in seconds

properties.name: triggerData
properties.description:
number instead of integer because not all uint32 can be represented by
int

properties.name: aggregatableReportWindow
properties.description: duration in seconds

properties.name: value
properties.description:
number instead of integer because not all uint32 can be represented by
int

types.description: A single Related Website Set object.

properties.name: primarySites
properties.description: The primary site of this set, along with the ccTLDs if there is any.

properties.name: associatedSites
properties.description: The associated sites of this set, along with the ccTLDs if there is any.

properties.name: serviceSites
properties.description: The service sites of this set, along with the ccTLDs if there is any.

commands.name: getStorageKeyForFrame
commands.description:
Returns a storage key given a frame id.
Deprecated. Please use Storage.getStorageKey instead.

commands.name: getStorageKey
commands.description:
Returns storage key for the given frame. If no frame ID is provided,
the storage key of the target executing this command is returned.

commands.name: clearDataForOrigin
commands.description: Clears storage for origin.

parameters.name: storageTypes
parameters.description: Comma separated list of StorageType to clear.

commands.name: clearDataForStorageKey
commands.description: Clears storage for storage key.

parameters.name: storageTypes
parameters.description: Comma separated list of StorageType to clear.

commands.name: getCookies
commands.description: Returns all browser cookies.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: Browser context to use when called on the browser endpoint.

commands.name: setCookies
commands.description: Sets given cookies.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: Browser context to use when called on the browser endpoint.

commands.name: clearCookies
commands.description: Clears cookies.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: Browser context to use when called on the browser endpoint.

commands.name: getUsageAndQuota
commands.description: Returns usage and quota in bytes.

returns.name: overrideActive
returns.description: Whether or not the origin has an active storage quota override

commands.name: overrideQuotaForOrigin
commands.description: Override quota for the specified origin

parameters.name: quotaSize
parameters.description:
The quota size (in bytes) to override the original quota with.
If this is called multiple times, the overridden quota will be equal to
the quotaSize provided in the final call. If this is called without
specifying a quotaSize, the quota will be reset to the default value for
the specified origin. If this is called multiple times with different
origins, the override will be maintained for each origin until it is
disabled (called without a quotaSize).

commands.name: trackCacheStorageForOrigin
commands.description: Registers origin to be notified when an update occurs to its cache storage list.

commands.name: trackCacheStorageForStorageKey
commands.description: Registers storage key to be notified when an update occurs to its cache storage list.

commands.name: trackIndexedDBForOrigin
commands.description: Registers origin to be notified when an update occurs to its IndexedDB.

commands.name: trackIndexedDBForStorageKey
commands.description: Registers storage key to be notified when an update occurs to its IndexedDB.

commands.name: untrackCacheStorageForOrigin
commands.description: Unregisters origin from receiving notifications for cache storage.

commands.name: untrackCacheStorageForStorageKey
commands.description: Unregisters storage key from receiving notifications for cache storage.

commands.name: untrackIndexedDBForOrigin
commands.description: Unregisters origin from receiving notifications for IndexedDB.

commands.name: untrackIndexedDBForStorageKey
commands.description: Unregisters storage key from receiving notifications for IndexedDB.

commands.name: getTrustTokens
commands.description:
Returns the number of stored Trust Tokens per issuer for the
current browsing context.

commands.name: clearTrustTokens
commands.description:
Removes all Trust Tokens issued by the provided issuerOrigin.
Leaves other stored data, including the issuer's Redemption Records, intact.

returns.name: didDeleteTokens
returns.description: True if any tokens were deleted, false otherwise.

commands.name: getInterestGroupDetails
commands.description: Gets details for a named interest group.

returns.name: details
returns.description:
This largely corresponds to:
https://wicg.github.io/turtledove/#dictdef-generatebidinterestgroup
but has absolute expirationTime instead of relative lifetimeMs and
also adds joiningOrigin.

commands.name: setInterestGroupTracking
commands.description: Enables/Disables issuing of interestGroupAccessed events.

commands.name: setInterestGroupAuctionTracking
commands.description:
Enables/Disables issuing of interestGroupAuctionEventOccurred and
interestGroupAuctionNetworkRequestCreated.

commands.name: getSharedStorageMetadata
commands.description: Gets metadata for an origin's shared storage.

commands.name: getSharedStorageEntries
commands.description: Gets the entries in an given origin's shared storage.

commands.name: setSharedStorageEntry
commands.description: Sets entry with `key` and `value` for a given origin's shared storage.

parameters.name: ignoreIfPresent
parameters.description:
If `ignoreIfPresent` is included and true, then only sets the entry if
`key` doesn't already exist.

commands.name: deleteSharedStorageEntry
commands.description: Deletes entry for `key` (if it exists) for a given origin's shared storage.

commands.name: clearSharedStorageEntries
commands.description: Clears all entries for a given origin's shared storage.

commands.name: resetSharedStorageBudget
commands.description: Resets the budget for `ownerOrigin` by clearing all budget withdrawals.

commands.name: setSharedStorageTracking
commands.description: Enables/disables issuing of sharedStorageAccessed events.

commands.name: setStorageBucketTracking
commands.description: Set tracking for a storage key's buckets.

commands.name: deleteStorageBucket
commands.description: Deletes the Storage Bucket with the given storage key and bucket name.

commands.name: runBounceTrackingMitigations
commands.description: Deletes state for sites identified as potential bounce trackers, immediately.

commands.name: setAttributionReportingLocalTestingMode
commands.description: https://wicg.github.io/attribution-reporting-api/

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: If enabled, noise is suppressed and reports are sent immediately.

commands.name: setAttributionReportingTracking
commands.description: Enables/disables issuing of Attribution Reporting events.

commands.name: sendPendingAttributionReports
commands.description:
Sends all pending Attribution Reports immediately, regardless of their
scheduled report time.

returns.name: numSent
returns.description: The number of reports that were sent.

commands.name: getRelatedWebsiteSets
commands.description:
Returns the effective Related Website Sets in use by this profile for the browser
session. The effective Related Website Sets will not change during a browser session.

commands.name: getAffectedUrlsForThirdPartyCookieMetadata
commands.description:
Returns the list of URLs from a page and its embedded resources that match
existing grace period URL pattern rules.
https://developers.google.com/privacy-sandbox/cookies/temporary-exceptions/grace-period

parameters.name: firstPartyUrl
parameters.description: The URL of the page currently being visited.

parameters.name: thirdPartyUrls
parameters.description: The list of embedded resource URLs from the page.

returns.name: matchedUrls
returns.description:
Array of matching URLs. If there is a primary pattern match for the first-
party URL, only the first-party URL is returned in the array.

events.name: cacheStorageContentUpdated
events.description: A cache's contents have been modified.

events.name: indexedDBContentUpdated
events.description: The origin's IndexedDB object store has been modified.

events.name: indexedDBListUpdated
events.description: The origin's IndexedDB database list has been modified.

events.name: interestGroupAccessed
events.description:
One of the interest groups was accessed. Note that these events are global
to all targets sharing an interest group store.

parameters.name: componentSellerOrigin
parameters.description:
For topLevelBid/topLevelAdditionalBid, and when appropriate,
win and additionalBidWin

parameters.name: bid
parameters.description: For bid or somethingBid event, if done locally and not on a server.

parameters.name: uniqueAuctionId
parameters.description: For non-global events --- links to interestGroupAuctionEvent

events.name: interestGroupAuctionEventOccurred
events.description:
An auction involving interest groups is taking place. These events are
target-specific.

events.name: interestGroupAuctionNetworkRequestCreated
events.description:
Specifies which auctions a particular network fetch may be related to, and
in what role. Note that it is not ordered with respect to
Network.requestWillBeSent (but will happen before loadingFinished
loadingFailed).

parameters.name: auctions
parameters.description:
This is the set of the auctions using the worklet that issued this
request.  In the case of trusted signals, it's possible that only some of
them actually care about the keys being queried.

events.name: sharedStorageAccessed
events.description:
Shared storage was accessed by the associated page.
The following parameters are included in all events.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Enum value indicating the access scope.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Enum value indicating the Shared Storage API method invoked.

parameters.name: mainFrameId
parameters.description: DevTools Frame Token for the primary frame tree's root.

parameters.name: ownerOrigin
parameters.description: Serialization of the origin owning the Shared Storage data.

parameters.name: ownerSite
parameters.description: Serialization of the site owning the Shared Storage data.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description:
The sub-parameters wrapped by `params` are all optional and their
presence/absence depends on `type`.

events.name: sharedStorageWorkletOperationExecutionFinished
events.description:
A shared storage run or selectURL operation finished its execution.
The following parameters are included in all events.

parameters.name: executionTime
parameters.description:
Time, in microseconds, from start of shared storage JS API call until
end of operation execution in the worklet.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Enum value indicating the Shared Storage API method invoked.

parameters.name: workletTargetId
parameters.description:
Hex representation of the DevTools token used as the TargetID for the
associated shared storage worklet.

parameters.name: mainFrameId
parameters.description: DevTools Frame Token for the primary frame tree's root.

parameters.name: ownerOrigin
parameters.description: Serialization of the origin owning the Shared Storage data.

parameters.name: netError
parameters.description: If result is `sent`, populated with net/HTTP status.
